maintained_by: Claude agents — update after every session that changes architecture, contracts, or functional specs

project_identity.name: Virima V6 Feature Documentation
project_identity.type: React + Vite SPA — manually curated documentation website with graph-driven navigation
project_identity.brand_name_rule: Always uppercase: VIRIMA — never Virima, virima, or ViRiMa
project_identity.business_goal: Serve versioned, enterprise-grade product documentation to Virima customers and IT administrators

project_scope.what_it_publishes: GFM Markdown documentation (.md) organized by a master TOC and served as a React SPA with graph-based navigation
project_scope.planned_versions_note: These are commented out in code. Do not activate without explicit work to enable them.
target_audience: End users of Virima V6 platform

content_architecture.master_toc: src/pages/content/6_1/index.md — the single source of truth for all navigation hierarchy
content_architecture.content_files: src/pages/content/6_1/**/*.md — manually maintained GFM markdown docs
content_architecture.content_ownership: Content files are manually maintained. Edit them directly. Ensure each file is referenced in the master TOC.
content_architecture.adding_content: 1. Create .md file at correct path. 2. Add entry to master TOC (index.md). 3. Run pnpm sync-toc && pnpm build-doc-graph.
content_architecture.removing_content: 1. Delete .md file. 2. Remove entry from master TOC. 3. Run pnpm sync-toc && pnpm build-doc-graph.
content_architecture.toc_drives_everything: Navigation sidebar, breadcrumbs, search index, and doc graph are ALL derived from the master TOC — never from individual file metadata

repo_contracts.package_manager: pnpm — NEVER use npm or yarn
repo_contracts.language_policy: TypeScript only — all files under src/, scripts/, root utilities must be .ts or .tsx
repo_contracts.base_path_note: Relative — GitHub Pages serves dist/ at domain root; relative paths work everywhere

folder_structure.src/pages/content/6_1/index.md: MASTER TOC — single source of truth for navigation. Edit this to add/remove pages.
folder_structure.src/pages/content/6_1/: Active version 6.1 documentation files — organized in module_6_1/ subdirectories
folder_structure.src/lib/content/: Runtime content loading library — contentLoader, registry, manifests
folder_structure.src/data/navigationData.ts: AUTO-GENERATED — nav structure from sync-toc. Do not hand-edit.
folder_structure.src/utils/indexContentMap.ts: AUTO-GENERATED — TOC content strings from sync-toc. Do not hand-edit.
folder_structure.src/utils/docGraph.ts: Runtime graph client — loads doc-graph.json once per session; L0/L1/L2 progressive disclosure API
folder_structure.src/styles/globals.css: Global CSS — Tailwind v4, theme tokens, layout foundation
folder_structure.src/assets/images/6_1/: Version-scoped image assets organized by module subdirectory
folder_structure.scripts/: Build, sync, validation scripts — kebab-case.ts or camelCase.ts
folder_structure.scripts/build-doc-graph.ts: Builds public/doc-graph.json — parse master TOC + all .md files; compute nodes/edges
folder_structure.scripts/build-search-index.ts: Builds public/search-index.json — 385 entries from master TOC; title+headings+excerpt
folder_structure.scripts/sync-toc-from-index.ts: Reads master index.md → writes navigationData.ts + indexContentMap.ts
folder_structure.scripts/checks/: Structural integrity checks — verify-security.ts, verify-setup.ts, verify-paths.ts
folder_structure.public/doc-graph.json: BUILD ARTIFACT — 385 pages, 1045 edges. Generated by pnpm build-doc-graph. Never hand-edit.
folder_structure.public/search-index.json: BUILD ARTIFACT — 385 search entries. Generated by pnpm build-search-index. Never hand-edit.
folder_structure.docs/: Human-readable documentation, decisions, evals, operations, plans, prompts
folder_structure.docs/memory/: Canonical AI memory system — this directory
folder_structure.dist/: Build output — deployed to GitHub Pages via deploy-pages.yml. Never commit hand-crafted files here.
folder_structure..claude/: Claude Code configuration — commands, settings, launch
folder_structure..claude/settings.json: Claude Code session hooks — pnpm-only guardrail; content-edit reminder; legacy-path check; Stop reminder
PROHIBITED_legacy_paths: build/ — wrong output dir, always use dist/
src/lib/imports/ — deleted; static MDX import maps no longer exist

doc_graph_architecture.purpose: Token-efficient, build-time structural index of all documentation pages
doc_graph_architecture.incremental_mode: pnpm build-doc-graph -- --incremental compares contentHash, re-parses only changed files
doc_graph_architecture.runtime_client: src/utils/docGraph.ts — loads once per session, session-cached

progressive_disclosure.L1: getModuleNodes(), getSectionNodes() — section page lists (~200-500 tokens)
progressive_disclosure.L2: getNodeById(), getNextNode(), getPrevNode() — navigation without body content

search_index_architecture.coverage: All TOC-referenced pages (5 pre-known missing files excluded from coverage)

entry_schema.title: H1 title
entry_schema.headingIds: slugified heading IDs for anchor links
entry_schema.excerpt: first 280 chars of plain text body

search_index_architecture.lazy_loading: Loaded on first search — not at app boot

build_pipeline.prebuild_sequence: sync-toc → build-doc-graph → build-search-index → build-sitemap → vite build
build_pipeline.sync_toc: Reads master index.md → writes navigationData.ts + indexContentMap.ts
build_pipeline.build_doc_graph: Parses master TOC + all .md files → public/doc-graph.json (385 pages, 1045 edges)
build_pipeline.vite_build: Bundles React SPA + copies all .md content files to dist/content/
build_pipeline.content_copy: vite.config.ts copyContentPlugin: src/pages/content/ → dist/content/ (serves .md at runtime)
build_pipeline.after_adding_content: Run pnpm sync-toc && pnpm build-doc-graph && pnpm build-search-index to update all derived artifacts

publishing_contract.inactive_versions_note: 6.1.1, 5.13, NextGen are defined in VERSION_MAP but excluded from exported versions array

navigation_contract.left_sidebar_source: navigationData.ts (auto-generated from master index.md via sync-toc)
navigation_contract.nav_label_source: Page labels from master TOC index.md entries
navigation_contract.expand_collapse: Sections expand/collapse; state tracked in component; expandAll/collapseAll supported
navigation_contract.mobile_sidebar: Slide-in overlay at z-40; hamburger toggle; lg:hidden
navigation_contract.desktop_sidebar: ResizableSidebar component; initial 288px; min 200px; max 500px; hidden below lg (1024px)
navigation_contract.resize_handle: 6px emerald green handle on right edge of left sidebar
navigation_contract.version_in_nav: Version selector in header, not sidebar
navigation_contract.active_state: Current page highlighted; ancestor sections auto-expanded
navigation_contract.dark_mode_note: All dark: variants live in NavigationMenu.tsx class strings. See dark_mode_contrast section for full context.

toc_contract.placement: Right rail — inside the constrained layout container, NOT at viewport edge
toc_contract.visibility: Hidden below xl breakpoint (1280px) — xl:block class (back-filled in globals.css)
toc_contract.positioning: sticky top-20 self-start — sticks relative to main scroll container
toc_contract.overflow: overflow-y-auto — long TOC lists scroll internally
toc_contract.auto_extract: autoExtract={true} — DOM heading extraction, no manual items needed
toc_contract.heading_levels: h2, h3, h4 — id attributes required for scroll targeting
toc_contract.scroll_behavior: window.scrollTo with 100px header offset — NOTE: <main> is actual scroll container, window.scrollTo is pre-existing limitation
toc_contract.metadata_above_toc: Release Date and Last Updated shown above TOC links in the aside
toc_contract.dark_mode_note: All dark: variants live in TableOfContents.tsx class strings. See dark_mode_contrast section for full context.

runtime_content_loading.note: Strategy 1 (static MDX imports from src/lib/imports/) was removed — those 14 import map files were deleted as dead code
runtime_content_loading.version_context: setVersion() must be called before getContent() — maps display version (6.1) to internal code (6_1)
runtime_content_loading.scroll_to_top: Double RAF on filePath change ensures DOM reset between page navigations
runtime_content_loading.html_extraction_safety: extractMDXFromHTML() uses DOMParser (not regex) to strip HTML — prevents incomplete-regex XSS (CodeQL CWE-116)

filename_rules.h1_title: Every content file should begin with an H1 heading — used as the page title

content_quality_rules.heading_case: Sentence case — e.g., 'Managing incidents' not 'Managing Incidents'
content_quality_rules.gfm_only: Use only GFM Markdown syntax — no JSX, no MDX components, no Confluence macros
content_quality_rules.no_frontmatter_required: Frontmatter is not required by the renderer
content_quality_rules.internal_links: Use relative paths where possible; mdxLinkConverter.ts resolves .md links to routes
content_quality_rules.images: Place at src/assets/images/6_1/{module}/ and reference as /assets/images/6_1/{module}/{filename}

routing.base_path: '' (empty — served from domain root on GitHub Pages)

breadcrumbs.clickable: Home, version, and module crumbs are clickable and trigger navigation callbacks
breadcrumbs.visibility: Only shown when breadcrumbs array has >0 items

topic_page_layout.reading_layout: Two-column: article flex-1 + aside w-64; both inside max-w-7xl mx-auto container

leftnav_rightnav_toc.left_nav: ResizableSidebar with NavigationMenu — module/section/page tree; hidden below lg; initial 288px
leftnav_rightnav_toc.right_nav_toc: TableOfContents in sticky aside — auto-extracts h2/h3/h4 headings; hidden below xl; w-64; sticky top-20
leftnav_rightnav_toc.both_inside_shell: Right TOC is inside the max-w-7xl centered container — NOT at viewport edge
leftnav_rightnav_toc.layout_bug_history: Previously TOC was a ResizableSidebar sibling outside constrained wrapper. Fixed 2026-03-31.

loading_states.page_loading: Spinner: animate-spin emerald border-4 h-8 w-8 with 'Loading documentation...' text
loading_states.path_loading: Simple 'Loading...' text while TOC path resolves
loading_states.image_loading: OptimizedImage component shows animate-pulse skeleton; priority=true bypasses IntersectionObserver

error_states.content_not_found: ContentNotAvailable component — shows file path, error details, version/module/section/page context
error_states.module_landing: When no section/page selected: doc icon + 'Select a topic from the sidebar' prompt
error_states.image_error: ImageWithFallback shows 'Image not available' placeholder with broken image icon

empty_states.no_toc_items: TableOfContents returns null — aside disappears; article takes full width
empty_states.no_breadcrumbs: Breadcrumb section hidden when buildBreadcrumbPath returns empty array

layout_contracts.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 — h-14 mobile / h-16 tablet+; max-w-[1920px] mx-auto inner
layout_contracts.content_layout_container: flex gap-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto w-full — holds article + TOC together
layout_contracts.article_column: flex-1 min-w-0 — fills available space after TOC
layout_contracts.toc_aside: hidden xl:block w-64 flex-shrink-0 self-start sticky top-20 doc-toc-rail
layout_contracts.tailwind_v4_precompile_note: src/index.css is a pre-compiled Tailwind v4 artifact. New utility classes not in original scan are MISSING. Back-fill in globals.css. Known back-filled: xl:block, .doc-toc-rail

responsive_breakpoints.mobile_default: Single column; left sidebar hidden; TOC hidden; article full width
responsive_breakpoints.lg_1024px: Left ResizableSidebar appears; layout padding increases (px-8, pt-16)
responsive_breakpoints.xl_1280px: Right TOC aside appears (xl:block); two-column reading layout active
responsive_breakpoints.mobile_sidebar: Slide-in overlay; z-40; full height; w-72

search_capabilities.static_search_index: public/search-index.json — 385 entries; lazy-loaded on first search; covers all TOC pages
search_capabilities.trigger: Search button in DocumentationHeader or keyboard shortcut
search_capabilities.chat_integration: Chat panel (ChatPanel.tsx) provides conversational search and Q&A

versioning_and_dropdown_behavior.version_switching: onVersionChange callback navigates to selected version's content
versioning_and_dropdown_behavior.version_persistence: Version in URL persists across navigation within same session

homepage_cards.card_type: Module tiles — one per active module
homepage_cards.card_click_behavior: Navigates to module landing page; triggers onModuleChange callback
homepage_cards.card_contents: Module name, icon, short description, doc count
homepage_cards.cover_page: CoverPage.tsx — enterprise hero with logo and version info
homepage_cards.homepage_layout: Cover page above; module cards grid below

theme_and_branding.brand_primary_color: Emerald green — #2E7D32 (dark tables), #10b981 (resize handle, active links)
theme_and_branding.table_th_alignment: center — both Tailwind text-center and inline style textAlign:center; globals.css text-align:center !important
theme_and_branding.brand_green_token: #3db553 — CSS var(--brand) in :root and .dark (same value in both)
theme_and_branding.brand_dark_token: #2e9141 (light mode deeper green) / #4ece66 (dark mode lighter green)
theme_and_branding.emerald_hover_backfill: dark:hover:text-emerald-400 not in pre-compiled index.css — back-filled in globals.css
theme_and_branding.dark_mode_complete: All nav, TOC, and prose dark variants applied as of 64ba502
theme_and_branding.reference_quality_bar: prds_ng repo — use as enterprise UI quality standard

content_rendering_rules.renderer: MDXRenderer.tsx — ReactMarkdown with remark-gfm, rehype-raw, and rehype-sanitize (in that order — sanitize must follow raw to clean parsed HTML)
content_rendering_rules.content_rendering_sanitizer: rehype-sanitize with custom SANITIZE_SCHEMA extending defaultSchema — allows className/style on *, code, span, div; blocks on* event handlers
content_rendering_rules.heading_hierarchy: H1 = page title; H2 = major sections; H3 = subsections; max depth H4
content_rendering_rules.heading_ids: extractHeadings.ts assigns IDs; ensureHeadingIds() called on render
content_rendering_rules.internal_links: Relative paths — mdxLinkConverter.ts handles link resolution
content_rendering_rules.code_blocks: react-syntax-highlighter for colored code; code.bg-slate-100 for inline
content_rendering_rules.inline_code_color: var(--accent-foreground) — black in light, slate in dark (globals.css rule)
content_rendering_rules.image_renderer: OptimizedImage component via img: renderer in MDXRenderer
content_rendering_rules.image_priority: priority={true} — eager loading; IntersectionObserver bypass (zero-size container fix)
content_rendering_rules.image_classes: rounded-lg shadow-md my-6 max-w-full h-auto border-[0.5px] border-slate-400

table_rendering_rules.specificity_approach: 18-selector block with !important overrides for enterprise reliability
table_rendering_rules.th_alignment: center — text-align: center !important in globals.css AND text-center class AND textAlign:'center' inline style in MDXRenderer th renderer
table_rendering_rules.td_alignment: start (left) — no explicit rule; browser default
table_rendering_rules.responsive: Horizontal scroll on narrow viewports via overflow-x-auto wrapper

image_asset_rules.build_copy: copyAssetsPlugin in vite.config.ts copies src/assets/images/ → dist/assets/images/
image_asset_rules.dev_serve: serveAssetsPlugin in vite.config.ts serves /assets/images/* from src/assets/images/*
image_asset_rules.optimized_image_wrapper: div.relative.inline-block — wrapper has 0x0 size before image loads
image_asset_rules.lazy_load_bug_fix: priority={true} bypasses IntersectionObserver — zero-size container prevents intersection detection
image_asset_rules.image_fallback: ImageWithFallback.tsx — shows 'Image not available' on error
image_asset_rules.alt_text: Required on all images — description of what the image shows

tooling_and_build.build_command: pnpm build — runs prebuild (sync-toc → build-doc-graph → build-search-index → build-sitemap) then vite build
tooling_and_build.dev_command: pnpm dev — Vite dev server port 3000
tooling_and_build.preview_command: pnpm preview — serve production build port 4173
tooling_and_build.sync_toc: pnpm sync-toc — regenerate navigationData.ts + indexContentMap.ts from master index.md
tooling_and_build.build_doc_graph: pnpm build-doc-graph — build public/doc-graph.json from master TOC + .md files
tooling_and_build.watch_toc: pnpm watch-toc — file watcher for auto-sync during development
tooling_and_build.validate: pnpm validate — typecheck + check:security + check:setup + check:paths
tooling_and_build.eval: pnpm eval — all documentation quality evals
tooling_and_build.test: pnpm test — Vitest unit tests in scripts/__tests__/
vite_custom_plugins: serveAssetsPlugin: /assets/images/* and /content/* served in dev mode
tooling_and_build.tailwind_v4_css_file: src/index.css — pre-compiled Tailwind v4 artifact; new classes require globals.css back-fill
tooling_and_build.docker: docker-compose.yml — nginx production container; port 8080:8080 (local preview only)
tooling_and_build.nginx_port: 8080 — nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged:alpine runs on port 8080 (local preview only; production is GitHub Pages)
tooling_and_build.check_paths: pnpm check:paths — path contract validator; exits 0=all pass, non-zero=violation found
tooling_and_build.memory_update: pnpm memory:update — bump memory_version patch + generated_at after editing memory

validation_gates.docs_eval_on_failure: Fix flagged documentation coverage or structure
validation_gates.required_sequence: typecheck → validate (includes check:paths) → eval → build — all must pass before merge
validation_gates.doc_graph_check: Verify public/doc-graph.json exists with pages≥350 after build
validation_gates.search_index_check: Verify public/search-index.json exists with entries≥350 after build

workflow_contracts.merge_strategy: Fast-forward when branch is ahead of main tip; cherry-pick for diverged branches
prohibited_without_review: Changing vite base path (currently './' — required for GitHub Pages root-served deployment)
Editing master index.md structure without running pnpm sync-toc

ci_cd_contracts.ci_trigger: Push to feature/fix/refactor/autofeature branches + PRs to main
ci_cd_contracts.deploy_local_docker: Optional local-only Docker preview via docker compose (nginx.conf + Dockerfile, NOT production CI)
ci_cd_contracts.note: The generate-v6feature-docs.yml generation workflow was intentionally removed as part of the 2026-04-07 architecture migration to manual content curation

secret_dependencies.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Required for AI-powered search (NOT for doc generation — generation pipeline removed)
secret_dependencies.GITHUB_TOKEN: Required for PR creation and branch operations
secret_dependencies.note: Never hardcode secrets — check:security scan enforces this

anti_patterns_to_avoid.wrong_package_manager: npm install / yarn add — must be pnpm
anti_patterns_to_avoid.editing_auto_generated: Hand-editing navigationData.ts or indexContentMap.ts — run pnpm sync-toc instead
anti_patterns_to_avoid.editing_build_artifacts: Hand-editing public/doc-graph.json or public/search-index.json — run pnpm build instead
anti_patterns_to_avoid.toc_out_of_sync: Adding .md files without updating master index.md — always update index.md and run sync-toc
anti_patterns_to_avoid.deleted_static_imports: Importing from src/lib/imports/ — that directory was deleted; it no longer exists
anti_patterns_to_avoid.deleted_generation_scripts: Referencing generate-feature-doc.ts, validate-generation.ts, path-mapping.ts — those were deleted

branch_naming.no_slashes: Forward slashes prohibited in branch names
branch_naming.no_feature_slash: Do NOT use feature/foo or fix/bar patterns

graph_based_navigation.what: Build-time doc graph (doc-graph.json) with nodes, edges, and progressive disclosure API
graph_based_navigation.why: Token-efficient navigation and search — load graph once, never load page bodies for nav
graph_based_navigation.benefit: L0 metadata in ~100 tokens; L1 section pages in ~200-500 tokens; page bodies only on demand

static_search_index.what: Build-time search index (search-index.json) covering all 385 TOC pages
static_search_index.why: Full-text search across all pages without loading page bodies
static_search_index.benefit: 20x improvement over previous 17-entry index; loaded lazily on first search

ai_search.what: AI-powered search dialog using Anthropic API
ai_search.why: Enables semantic search beyond keyword matching
ai_search.problem_prevented: Users can't find relevant docs via keyword search

constrained_reading_layout.what: Two-column reading layout: article (flex-1) + TOC rail (w-64) inside max-w-7xl centered container
constrained_reading_layout.why: Enterprise documentation reading standard; matches prds_ng quality bar
constrained_reading_layout.benefit: Comfortable ~785px reading width; TOC visually attached to content

tailwind_v4_precompile_strategy.what: src/index.css is pre-compiled; missing utilities back-filled in globals.css
tailwind_v4_precompile_strategy.why: No @tailwindcss/vite plugin installed; CSS is committed artifact
tailwind_v4_precompile_strategy.benefit: Controlled, explicit utility management without build chain changes

dark_mode_contrast.approach: Centralized CSS override in globals.css — NOT scattered dark: variants in every component
dark_mode_contrast.why_centralized: MDXRenderer components use hardcoded Tailwind utilities (text-slate-900, text-slate-700) with no dark: variants. CSS specificity (0,2,1) for .dark .prose rules beats Tailwind utility (0,1,0) without !important.
dark_mode_contrast.prose_override_location: src/styles/globals.css — .dark .prose block at end of file

prose_rules.links: .dark .prose a → color: #34d058; .dark .prose a:hover → color: #4ece66 (lighter, correct direction)

dark_mode_contrast.nav_toc_approach: Direct dark: Tailwind variants on NavigationMenu.tsx and TableOfContents.tsx class strings
dark_mode_contrast.backfilled_variant: dark:hover:text-emerald-400 not in pre-compiled src/index.css — back-filled in globals.css
dark_mode_contrast.commit: 64ba502 — fix(theme): enterprise-grade dark mode contrast — centralized prose, nav, and TOC fixes
dark_mode_contrast.tailwind_v4_precompile_note: Check src/index.css for available dark: variants before using them in JSX. Not all variants are compiled. Back-fill in globals.css if needed.

sub_landing_page_behavior.module_landing: When user navigates to a module with no page selected: shows doc icon + 'Select a topic from the sidebar' text prompt
sub_landing_page_behavior.sub_landing_route: URL: /{version}/{module} — no section or page in URL
sub_landing_page_behavior.section_as_entry_point: Clicking a section header in nav auto-selects the first page in that section
sub_landing_page_behavior.breadcrumb_on_landing: Shows Home → Module only (section and page crumbs absent until page selected)
sub_landing_page_behavior.toc_on_landing: TableOfContents returns null when no content loaded — aside disappears, article full-width

security_contract.static_site: No server-side code; no user accounts; no backend — appropriate security scope for public docs
security_contract.tls: GitHub Pages CDN provides TLS automatically
security_contract.content_rendering: rehype-sanitize in MDXRenderer.tsx blocks XSS from HTML in markdown content
security_contract.http_headers: nginx.conf (local Docker only) provides CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.
security_contract.secret_scanning: pnpm check:security scans for sk-, sk-ant-, AKIA, ghp_, github_pat_ patterns
security_contract.api_key_exposure_warning: VITE_* environment variables compile into JS bundle — scope AI API keys to specific domains; set strict usage limits
security_contract.codeowners: .github/CODEOWNERS requires review for Dockerfile, nginx.conf, workflows, memory files
security_contract.never_add: Auth/login systems, disable rehype-sanitize, hardcode API keys in source

repo_specific: Content path: src/pages/content/6_1/ with _6_1 suffix directories
Module names (admin, cmdb, itsm, discovery-scan, itam, etc.)
reusable_patterns: Master index.md as single source of truth for navigation TOC
sync-toc-from-index.ts pattern: master index.md → navigationData.ts + indexContentMap.ts
Build-time doc graph: build-doc-graph.ts → doc-graph.json (nodes, edges, metadata)
Progressive disclosure API: L0 metadata → L1 section pages → L2 navigation only
Static search index: build-search-index.ts → search-index.json (all pages, lazy-loaded)
Content loader: fetch .md from dist/content/ at runtime
Two-column reading layout: max-w-7xl mx-auto container holding article + TOC rail
Tailwind v4 pre-compile back-fill pattern in globals.css
